# International Delivery Times

At Acme Shop, international delivery times are influenced by the destination country and chosen shipping method. Standard shipments typically range from 7 to 21 business days, while express shipping options can reduce this to 3 to 10 business days. It's important to note that these timeframes exclude weekends, public holidays, and customs-related delays. Customers should also account for a processing time of 1 to 3 business days and be aware that additional customs fees may apply upon package arrival, which are the recipient's responsibility.

[Source: international_shipping.md#international-delivery-times]
